scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && npm run dev --workspace @commute/web
scripts.build:web: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @commute/web
scripts.build:cli: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @commute/cli
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @commute/web && npm run build --workspace @commute/cli
scripts.preview: npm run build:shared && npm run preview --workspace @commute/web
